protein_name: Clathrin is the major protein of the polyhedral coat of coated pits and vesicles. Belongs to the clathrin light chain family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: ciliary membrane; clathrin coat; clathrin coat of coated pit; clathrin coat of trans-Golgi network vesicle; clathrin vesicle coat; clathrin-coated endocytic vesicle; clathrin-coated pit; cytoplasmic vesicle; cytoplasmic vesicle membrane; cytosol; membrane; plasma membrane; presynaptic endocytic zone membrane; synaptic vesicle membrane; trans-Golgi network
raw_fields.Molecular Function: clathrin heavy chain binding; peptide binding; protein binding; structural molecule activity
raw_fields.Biological Process: clathrin-dependent endocytosis; intracellular protein transport; synaptic vesicle endocytosis; vesicle-mediated transport
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: Clathrin light chain B; clathrin, light chain (Lcb); clathrin, light polypeptide (Lcb); CLCB; CLTB; Lcb
